wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,700;1,400&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'EB Garamond',serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#fef9c3!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#78350f!important;border-bottom:3px solid #d97706!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{font-size:16px!important;font-style:italic;padding:14px 28px!important;color:#78350f!important;letter-spacing:.04em;transition:all .3s;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(120,53,15,.08)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{background:#b45309!important;color:#fef9c3!important;font-style:normal;} .vintage-header{background:linear-gradient(170deg,#78350f,#92400e);padding:28px 28px 22px;border-bottom:2px solid #d97706;text-align:center;} .vintage-ornament{color:#d97706;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:8px;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;} .vintage-header h4{font-family:'EB Garamond',serif!important;color:#fef9c3;font-size:22px;font-weight:500;font-style:italic;margin:0 0 4px;text-shadow:1px 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.2);} .vintage-header span{color:#fde68a;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;} .vintage-divider{width:80px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#d97706,transparent);margin:14px auto 0;} .vintage-footer{padding:20px 28px;text-align:center;border-top:2px solid rgba(120,53,15,.12);} .vintage-footer .orn{color:#d97706;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:5px;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;} .vintage-footer a{color:#78350f!important;font-size:16px;margin:0 7px;transition:color .2s;} .vintage-footer a:hover{color:#d97706!important;}
